An announcement from Accuray ( (ARAY) ) is now available.

Accuray Incorporated reported that its Senior Vice President and Chief Operations Officer, Leonel Peralta, departed the company effective April 26, 2026. The company stated that Peralta’s resignation did not arise from any disagreement with management, the board, or matters related to Accuray’s operations, policies, or practices, signaling a routine leadership transition without disclosed strategic or operational disputes.

The change in the chief operations role may prompt adjustments in day-to-day operational oversight and execution, but the company’s clarification on the absence of disagreements aims to reassure investors, employees, and partners. Stakeholders are likely to focus on how Accuray fills the COO position and maintains continuity in operational strategy following Peralta’s departure.

The most recent analyst rating on (ARAY) stock is a Buy with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Accuray stock, see the ARAY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARAY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARAY is a Neutral.

ARAY scores low primarily due to weak financial performance (return to losses and high leverage with a thin equity cushion) and bearish technical trend signals. The latest earnings call further pressures the outlook via a meaningful guidance cut and margin deterioration, partially offset by strong orders/backlog and cost-reduction initiatives. Valuation provides limited support given negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on ARAY stock, click here.

More about Accuray

Accuray Incorporated operates in the medical technology industry, specializing in radiation therapy systems used for cancer treatment and other conditions. The company focuses on advanced radiosurgery and radiotherapy solutions that enable precise, targeted treatment, serving hospitals, cancer centers, and healthcare providers worldwide.

data.title: NatWest investors back all resolutions at 2026 AGM, approve 23p dividend
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from NatWest Group ( (GB:NWG) ) is now available.

NatWest Group shareholders approved all resolutions at the 2026 annual general meeting in Edinburgh, including the receipt of the 2025 report and accounts and the appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers as auditors. Investors also backed a final dividend of 23 pence per ordinary share, with around 73% of the issued share capital voting on the resolutions.

The AGM endorsed the re-election and election of all proposed board members and renewed wide-ranging authorities for the directors over share issuance, non-pre-emptive equity offerings and Equity Convertible Notes. Shareholders further authorised the bank to continue on- and off-market share buybacks, permit shorter notice periods for general meetings and maintain an existing framework for political donations, reinforcing the board’s financial and capital management flexibility.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:NWG) stock is a Hold with a £7.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NatWest Group stock, see the GB:NWG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NWG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NWG is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid profitability and upbeat guidance/capital returns, reinforced by attractive valuation. These positives are tempered by weak and volatile cash flow (including the most recent year), and softer near-term technical momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on NWG stock, click here.

More about NatWest Group

NatWest Group plc is a major U.K.-based banking and financial services institution, providing retail, commercial and corporate banking products to individuals, businesses and institutional clients. The group focuses on serving the U.K. and Irish markets with a broad range of lending, deposit, payments and capital markets services, and remains one of the country’s systemically important banks.

data.title: Hammerson CFO Exercises Share Options and Increases Equity Stake
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Hammerson plc R.E.I.T. ( (GB:HMSO) ).

Hammerson disclosed that its Chief Financial Officer and Executive Director, Himanshu Raja, has exercised nil-cost options over 123,878 ordinary shares granted in 2021 under the company’s Restricted Share Scheme, which became exercisable on 27 April 2026. He sold 58,428 shares on the London Stock Exchange to cover tax and national insurance liabilities and retained 65,450 shares, increasing his direct equity stake and aligning his interests further with shareholders.

The transaction, carried out partly outside a trading venue and partly on the London Stock Exchange, was reported in line with UK Market Abuse Regulation requirements. The disclosure underscores Hammerson’s adherence to governance and transparency standards around executive remuneration and insider dealings, and has also been communicated to investors via regulatory channels in Johannesburg and Dublin.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HMSO) stock is a Buy with a £448.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hammerson plc R.E.I.T. stock, see the GB:HMSO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HMSO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HMSO is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by an improving but still volatile financial profile (turnaround progress tempered by revenue and cash-flow inconsistency). Technicals add support via a clear uptrend, while valuation is a key positive with a low P/E and decent yield. Earnings-call guidance was constructive, though partly reliant on transactions and tempered by dilution and macro risks.

To see Spark’s full report on HMSO stock, click here.

More about Hammerson plc R.E.I.T.

Hammerson plc is a UK-listed real estate investment trust focused on owning, managing, and developing prime retail and mixed-use destinations. Its portfolio spans major shopping centres and city centre assets in key markets, providing retail-led property exposure to investors and serving a wide range of consumer-facing tenants.

An update from Dexin Services Group Ltd. ( (HK:2215) ) is now available.

Dexin Services Group Limited has announced the current composition of its board of directors, which includes two executive directors and three independent non-executive directors. The board is chaired by Mr. Tang Junjie, with Ms. Zheng Peng serving as an executive director alongside him.

Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:0579) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Ltd. announced that its first extraordinary general meeting of 2026 was duly convened in Beijing in compliance with PRC company law and the firm’s articles of association. The meeting, attended by most members of the board and supervised by the company’s H-share registrar as scrutineer, used poll voting in line with Hong Kong listing requirements.

Shareholders representing about 77.80% of the company’s issued share capital participated and approved the appointment of Ms. Wang Jing as a non-executive director, with more than 99% of votes cast in favour. The addition of Ms. Wang to the board strengthens the company’s governance structure and may influence future strategic decisions as Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy navigates China’s increasingly competitive clean energy market.

More about Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Ltd. Class H

Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Ltd. is a PRC-based joint stock company listed in Hong Kong that focuses on clean energy generation and related power services. The company operates within China’s evolving low-carbon energy sector, positioning itself to benefit from ongoing policy support for renewable and environmentally friendly power sources.

Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:0579) ) has provided an announcement.

Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Ltd. has disclosed unaudited internal financial data for the quarter ended 31 March 2026, as required by Chinese regulators overseeing debt financing instruments. The disclosure, prepared under Chinese accounting standards, covers the consolidated balance sheet of the company and its subsidiaries and has been made available via official financial market platforms in the mainland.

The company reported total current assets of about RMB 23.34 billion at the end of March 2026, down from roughly RMB 24.46 billion at the beginning of the period, with notable movements in cash, financial assets held for trading, and receivables. Investors are explicitly cautioned that these figures have not been audited or reviewed by the audit committee, underscoring that they are preliminary indicators for bondholders and equity investors rather than finalized financial results.

More about Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Ltd. Class H

Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Ltd. is a Chinese clean energy utility focused on power generation and related services, operating under China Accounting Standards for Business Enterprises. The company is listed in Hong Kong and has publicly issued debt in the onshore Chinese market, reflecting a funding strategy tied to domestic institutional investors.

data.title: Perfect Medical Proposes New 2026 Share Option Scheme and Major Grant to Chairman
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Perfect Medical Health Management Limited ( (HK:1830) ).

Perfect Medical Health Management Limited plans to terminate its existing 2021 share option scheme and replace it with a new 2026 share option scheme aligned with the latest Chapter 17 requirements of Hong Kong’s Listing Rules. Outstanding options totaling 11,304,000 shares will remain valid and exercisable, while the new plan is subject to shareholder approval at an extraordinary general meeting and the Stock Exchange’s listing approval for shares under the new mandate.

Under the proposed 2026 scheme, the board has conditionally granted 50,000,000 share options, representing about 3.98% of issued shares, to Chairman and CEO Dr. Au-Yeung Kong, reinforcing equity-based incentives for the controlling shareholder. This grant will only take effect if shareholders approve the new scheme and independent shareholders endorse the specific award, signaling a governance-sensitive approach to incentivizing top leadership and potentially affecting ownership concentration and long-term alignment with investors.

More about Perfect Medical Health Management Limited

Perfect Medical Health Management Limited is a Hong Kong–listed company in the healthcare and medical aesthetics sector, providing health management and related services to consumers in its core markets. The group uses equity-based incentives to align management and key participants with long-term shareholder value and regulatory requirements in Hong Kong’s capital markets.

Average Trading Volume: 364,768

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$1.49B

data.title: BeijingWest Industries Sets 2026 AGM, Seeks Fresh Share Issue Mandate
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from BeijingWest International ( (HK:2339) ).

BeijingWest Industries International Limited has convened its annual general meeting for 29 May 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will review the directors’ report and audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025. The meeting will also consider the re-election of directors Mr. Dong Xiaojie and Mr. Liu Xihe, the authorisation of the board to set directors’ remuneration, and the re-appointment of Grant Thornton Hong Kong Limited as auditor.

Shareholders will vote on granting the board a general mandate to allot and issue new shares up to 20% of the company’s existing issued share capital, excluding shares issued under rights issues, convertible securities, employee schemes, or scrip dividends. If approved, this mandate will enhance the company’s financial flexibility for potential capital-raising and strategic initiatives during the mandate period, which lasts until the next AGM or earlier revocation by shareholders.

More about BeijingWest International

BeijingWest Industries International Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands. The company is engaged in industrial operations and is traded on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong under stock code 2339, serving both domestic and international stakeholders in its sector.

An announcement from AECI Ltd ( (GB:87FZ) ) is now available.

AECI has announced that the audited annual financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 of its note guarantors AECI Mining Limited, AECI Mauritius Ltd and Chemical Services Limited are now available for inspection. The documents can be accessed at the company’s registered office or via a secure electronic platform upon request.

The company confirmed that the auditor reports on each guarantor’s financial statements are unqualified, indicating a clean audit outcome. This supports the integrity of AECI’s ZAR5 billion Domestic Medium Term Note Programme and provides reassurance to noteholders and other stakeholders about the financial soundness of the guarantor entities.

More about AECI Ltd

AECI Ltd is a South African-based industrial group operating through subsidiaries such as AECI Mining Limited, AECI Mauritius Ltd and Chemical Services Limited. The company is active in sectors including mining services and chemicals, with funding supported by a ZAR5 billion Domestic Medium Term Note Programme in the local debt capital markets.

data.title: Coeptis Therapeutics Advances Business Combination, Nasdaq Listing Plans
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings ( (COEP) ).

On April 27, 2026, Z Squared, Inc. issued supplemental details on its previously announced business combination with Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. and the related pro rata dividend distribution tied to Coeptis’s pre-combination biopharmaceutical business. The company confirmed that shareholders of record as of January 2, 2026, will receive one non-transferable share of Coeptis Holdings, Inc. common stock for each Z Squared common share held, with the distribution taking effect that same day.

Also on April 27, 2026, Z Squared’s common stock was expected to begin trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol ZSQR, marking a key capital markets milestone following the business combination. The clarified dividend mechanics and Nasdaq listing timing provide greater transparency for existing shareholders and position Z Squared to pursue its infrastructure-focused growth strategy as a publicly traded computing company.

More about Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings

Z Squared, Inc. is a vertically integrated computing infrastructure company that operates advanced, distributed computing equipment across North Carolina, South Carolina, and Iowa. The company focuses on optimizing large-scale specialized hardware through dynamic power management, real-time analytics, and in-house repair and lifecycle management to maximize efficiency and support rapid, resilient scalability.

Its facility-agnostic model is designed to mitigate reliance on any single hosting provider, adapt to shifting power costs and grid conditions, and reduce exposure to localized regulatory or infrastructure disruptions. Led by a team experienced in large-scale computing, infrastructure optimization, and power management, Z Squared targets emerging computing workloads while aiming to keep energy costs low and operational uptime high.

Average Trading Volume: 56,716

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

For a thorough assessment of COEP stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
